hero.title: Finance Director Summary
hero.description: Your cross-functional risk lens on VOIS — the non-finance signals across the organisation that move your OpsAnalytics, CapEx and Revenue forecasts. Track Revenue-at-Risk and Cost-at-Risk on contracts and projects, with a high-level P×Q view linking through to the marketplace dashboard. Core finance control reporting continues to run from Sarah's own systems.

costAtRisk.verdict: ✓ On plan — ahead of burn vs progress

aiSummary.title: Finance Risk Summary
aiSummary.overall: The cross-functional risk picture for Sarah is mixed with two clear red flags. Revenue forecast is largely covered by current sales pipeline but exposed to a small number of large contracts approaching renewal. CapEx is materially over-burn against completion, and OpsAnalytics has both a critical-role gap and an OpEx over-burn.

watchpoints.text: Revenue at Risk: €186M (DT Group · Project Helios) with no auto-renew flag, 42 days to expiry.
CapEx burn 134% against 81% project completion — escalation recommended.
OpsAnalytics: 22% critical-role gap is feeding OpEx over-burn at 112% / 78%.

stableSignals.text: CARE burn aligned with project completion.
Sales coverage at 96% of FY27 plan.
P×Q invoiced revenue tracking at 1074% of RF.

actions.text: Open renewal conversation on DT Group · Project Helios this week.
Convene CapEx review on Platform refresh — value vs completion.
Align OpsAnalytics critical-role plan with CHRO.

9.title: REQ 09 — ★ Basic Reporting Reliability
9.description: Not tracked as a Hub requirement. Data reliability of monthly / quarterly / annual reporting cycles is treated as a data-governance and business-process workstream under the broader Ether programme.
9.acceptanceCriteria: Out of scope for this requirements gathering — Hub should still surface the canonical view (or the multiple views with explanation) once governance fixes are made upstream.
9.userStory: As the Finance Director, I want upstream data-governance and mastership issues (HR ↔ Finance reconciliation, headcount) resolved under the Ether programme, so that when the Hub surfaces a canonical view of monthly / quarterly / annual figures I can trust its reliability.
feedback: Surfacing canonical view once data pipeline issues resolved
Headcount mastership data fixes handed over to Ether team

10.title: REQ 10 — Cross-Functional Financial View
10.description: A Finance Director risk view: cross-functional data points from across the org that affect her OpsAnalytics, CapEx and revenue forecasts, highlighting contracts in the last 6 months without renewal and project burn vs completion.
10.acceptanceCriteria: Sarah opens one page that highlights risk status for individual portfolios: OpsAnalytics, CapEx and Revenue Forecasts.
10.userStory: As the Finance Director, I want a single cross-functional risk view exposing the non-finance signals (HR, pipeline, operations, contract lifecycle) that affect my OpsAnalytics, CapEx and Revenue forecasts.
feedback: Kali recalled this terminology is not consistently used today
Cost-at-Risk compares burn percentages vs actual physical completion %

11.title: REQ 11 — P×Q / Billing Integration
11.description: High-level PQ revenue summary on the Hub (already present under Partnership Success) with an integration to the existing PQ marketplace dashboard for L1 / L2 / L3 service-type detail.
11.acceptanceCriteria: PQ KPIs visible on the Hub Partnership Success page; one click takes the user to the detailed PQ dashboard with context preserved.
11.userStory: As the Finance Director, I want a high-level P×Q revenue summary visible on the Hub's Partnership Success page with a one-click drill-through to the existing PQ marketplace dashboard.
feedback: Marketplace team owns L2/L3 invoices detail
Context preservation ensures filters carry over on click-through
